---
name: Survey a topic
about: Run a literature review and add the results to the library
title: "Survey: "
labels: agent
---

@sepo-agent /implement

Survey the topic below and propose the results as a PR. Definition of done:
new entries in `bibliography.bib`, citekey-matched notes under
`content/papers/`, and a synthesis note under `content/notes/` that links
them together.

<!-- To scope the survey first instead, replace /implement above with /answer. -->
